title: Verifier Stats
description: Spec-silent shape (the approved build plan's Phase 2 section names 'data/verifier_stats.json' -- one row appended per day by scripts/reconcile_run.py -- without fixing fields; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). Top-level object: a version plus one entry per analyst/verifier run, feeding the weekly audit.yml's verifier pass-rate trend check (rolling 7d/30d) and the Method page. cards_drafted is the analyst's own output count for that run; confirmed+reported+dropped should sum to cards_drafted (not schema-enforced, since a demoted-not-dropped card is still one of confirmed/reported); pass_rate is the run's own (confirmed+reported)/cards_drafted, precomputed so the frontend/auditor never has to re-derive it. Phase 2 seeds data/verifier_stats.json = {"version": 1, "runs": []}.

runs.description: One entry per analyst/verifier run, oldest first by convention (not schema-enforced).

cards_drafted.description: Total cards the analyst wrote this run, before the verifier's pass.

confirmed.description: Cards that finished this run with status confirmed.

reported.description: Cards that finished this run with status reported (including any demoted from confirmed).

dropped.description: Clusters the verifier permanently dropped this run (see data/ledger.json's status: 'dropped' entries).

pass_rate.description: (confirmed + reported) / cards_drafted for this run; 0 when cards_drafted is 0.
